symptoms.symptom_name: 'Stuck-on' warty pigmented lesion with pseudohorn cysts; multiple similar lesions; stable until trauma

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: 'Stuck-on' morphology with pseudohorn cysts on dermoscopy is characteristic of a seborrhoeic keratosis.
Stability/multiplicity/'stuck-on' morphology argue against melanoma, though dermoscopy is needed to confirm.

symptoms.symptom_name: No spontaneous evolution/bleeding before mechanical trauma

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of spontaneous change/bleeding lowers melanoma probability (confirm in person).

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person dermoscopic skin check (± biopsy if atypical)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To confirm the benign diagnosis and exclude melanoma, since dermoscopy cannot be done remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Excisional biopsy only if any atypical/changing lesion
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: For any lesion with concerning features on examination.
